mapper.insert: INSERT INTO usage_events (id, prompt_id, version_id, user_id, session_id, event_type, ip_address) VALUES ( gen_random_uuid(), #{promptId}::uuid, #{versionId}::uuidNULL, #{userId}::uuidNULL, #{sessionId}, #{eventType}, #{ipAddress}::inet )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM usage_events WHERE user_id = #{userId}::uuid AND event_type = 'generate' AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE
